In the event failure on your part to pay the remaining 
amount within stipulated period, the advance amount paid 
by you will be forfeited. In the event failure on our part 
to execute the sale deed, even though you are ready to 
pay the balance sale consideration and get registration 
of sale deed, in such an event we agreed to pay the 
double amount of the advance which you have paid as 
compensation. Hence, we have executed this Advance 
Sale Agreement by affixing our signature.
SCHEDULE:-

Bangalore South Taluk, now comes under Kengeri Town
